channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Case Against a Federal Bailout for Spirit Airlines
item.description: Analysts argue that government intervention to rescue the struggling airline would represent a costly and counterproductive use of public funds.

item.title: Dobbs Attorney Defended Mississippi Abortion Law Despite Strong Pressure to Step Back
item.description: The attorney who argued Mississippi's 15-week abortion restriction before the U.S. Supreme Court proceeded despite widespread advice from colleagues urging him not to take the case.

item.title: Opinion: Resistance to America's 250th Anniversary Celebrations Draws Scrutiny
item.description: Efforts to discourage or block commemorations of the United States' 250th anniversary have prompted criticism over perceived intolerance and a lack of civic perspective.

item.title: Federal report details failures behind deadly LaGuardia Airport plane collision
item.description: Federal investigators released findings identifying a sequence of errors and system failures that contributed to last month's fatal collision between a regional jet and another aircraft.

item.title: New York Times Coverage of USAID Closure Highlights Agency's Government Funding Dependence
item.description: A Times piece on USAID's dismantling underscores that the organization, while nominally nongovernmental, derived nearly all of its operating revenue from government sources.
